description_long: This is a modern baseball cap featuring a two-tone color scheme with a gray crown and a yellow brim, button, and adjustable strap. The front panel displays a prominent yellow and black logo resembling the Blender software emblem. The cap is constructed with visible stitching along the seams and panels, giving it a structured and durable appearance. The back of the cap includes a yellow plastic snapback closure for size adjustment, and the crown is rounded with a central button on top. The brim is slightly curved and wide, providing shade and style. The overall design is sporty and urban, suitable for casual wear in city environments.
description: A gray and yellow baseball cap with a curved brim, snapback closure, and a prominent Blender logo on the front. The cap features structured stitching and a sporty, urban style.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the yellow snapback closure and the rounded gray crown with visible stitching.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved yellow brim, gray crown, and top button.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the yellow brim and the large Blender logo on the gray front panel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the yellow brim, gray crown, and top button, mirroring the left side.
